arts.ttl: “That boy has quality” – Tottenham target backed to make it if he joins Spurs, former teammate signs praises
arts.sum: Feyenoord striker Anis Hadj Moussa absolutely has the quality to succeed at Tottenham if they were to move for him in the coming months. That’s according to his former teammate Henk Dijkhuizen via Voetbal Primeur, who believes the 22-year-old has everything to succeed at a higher level. arts.ttl: Richarlison's personal news prompts Tottenham response ahead of Rangers clash
arts.sum: Spurs confirmed last month the striker had sustained a'significant hamstring injury' and would be sidelined 'long-term' after having only returned from a two-month absence following a groin issue. Tottenham have suffered significantly with injuries this term and currently have Richarlison, Guglielmo Vicario and Wilson Odobert as long-term injury issues.

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Rangers with Bissouma and Van de Ven calls
arts.sum: Guest's team: Forster; Porro, Dragusin, Gray, Udogie; Bentancur, Bergvall, Maddison; Kulusevski, Solanke, Werner. That means Archie Gray starts the Rangers game at centre-back alongside Radu Dragusin, with Pedro Porro and Destiny Udogie as full-backs.

arts.ttl: Radu Dragusin ready for Rangers crowd and issues promise to Tottenham teenager
arts.sum: Thursday night's Battle of Britain has the added spice of former Celtic boss Postecoglou returning to Glasgow with Tottenham - and Radu Dragusin is excited about facing Rangers
